question: Will LME cobalt metal official cash settlement price exceed 55 USD per kg on June 30, 2026?
reason: Recent data indicates LME cobalt prices are projected to exceed $55 per kg by June 30, 2026.
evidence: As of May 21, 2026, the LME cobalt June 2026 forward contract closed at $56,290 per metric ton, equivalent to approximately $56.29 per kg. ([metalradar.com](https://metalradar.com/price/cobalt/lme/official/june-2026-forward/official-close?utm_source=openai))

The World Bank's April 2026 Commodity Markets Outlook projects base metal prices, including cobalt, to rise by 19% year-over-year in 2026, with aluminum, copper, and tin prices expected to reach all-time highs. ([thedocs.worldbank.org](https://thedocs.worldbank.org/en/doc/f3138644a1e8e2bb631399ae11d6c408-0050012026/original/CMO-April-2026.pdf?utm_source=openai))

PricePedia forecasts cobalt prices to reach $34,000 per metric ton in 2026, aligning with the recent LME forward contract prices. ([pricepedia.it](https://www.pricepedia.it/en/magazine/article/2025/10/20/cobalt-price-forecasts/?utm_source=openai))
searchQueries: LME cobalt metal price forecast June 2026
